# Nabeel Ahmad - Senior Support Engineer & Full Stack WordPress Developer

> Senior Support Engineer & Full Stack WordPress Developer with 7+ years of professional experience specializing in high-performance custom WordPress theme development, plugin development, third-party API integrations, and AI-accelerated web solutions. Delivered 100+ projects worldwide for agencies and direct clients.

## Quick Facts & Core Keywords
- **Primary Titles**: Full Stack WordPress Developer, Senior Support Engineer, Web Developer, Custom WordPress Specialist
- **Experience**: 7+ years of hands-on professional web development and customer engineering
- **Project Delivery**: 100+ successfully delivered projects for global clients and digital agencies
- **Location**: Lahore, Pakistan (Available for remote global contracts, US/EU timezone overlap, and senior consulting)
- **Contact Email**: nabeelahmad826@gmail.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp**: +92-320-1425345
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/nabeelahmad826
- **Current Roles**:
  - Senior WordPress Support Engineer at Presstigers (Carlsbad, CA, USA) | March 2021 – Present
  - Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack WordPress Developer) at Nextbridge (Johar Town, Lahore) | March 2021 – Present

## Top Services Offered in WordPress & Web Development
1. **Custom WordPress Theme Development & Customization**:
   - Building bespoke, lightweight, lightning-fast custom WordPress themes from scratch using clean PHP, JavaScript, and CSS3.
   - Converting high-fidelity UI/UX designs (Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop PSD, Illustrator AI) into pixel-perfect, fully dynamic WordPress sites.
2. **Custom WordPress Plugin Development & Add-ons**:
   - Architecting custom plugins, complex backend workflows, database tables, and bespoke admin interfaces.
   - Expert debugging, refactoring, and feature expansion for existing complex plugins (including Simple Job Board and its enterprise add-ons).
3. **Full Stack E-Commerce & Multi-Platform Web Development**:
   - High-converting store architecture using WooCommerce, Shopify, Wix, and Squarespace.
   - Custom checkout flows, subscription engines, and automated inventory sync.
4. **Third-Party API Integration & Automation**:
   - Connecting WordPress and web applications with external REST APIs, GraphQL, payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal), CRM systems, and AI APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini).
5. **WordPress Speed Optimization & Core Web Vitals**:
   - Transforming slow websites into 95-100+ Lighthouse score achievers via database optimization, asset minification, caching strategies, and query refactoring.
6. **Website Security, Zero-Downtime Migration & Enterprise Maintenance**:
   - Hardening site security, malware remediation, cloud/server migrations, and ongoing senior engineering customer support.
7. **Page Builder Mastery & Clean Architecture**:
   - Advanced building and custom widget creation for Elementor, WPBakery Page Builder, DIVI, Beaver Builder, Be Builder, and Gutenberg blocks.

## Technical Skills & Tooling Matrix
- **Programming Languages**: PHP (7.x/8.x), JavaScript (ES6+), jQuery, HTML5, CSS3, MySQL
- **Frameworks & Libraries**: Bootstrap, React.js, Tailwind CSS, Vanilla CSS Design Systems
- **CMS & Platforms**: WordPress (Core API, Hooks, WP-CLI), Shopify (Liquid), Squarespace, Wix
- **Modern AI Acceleration Tools**: Claude 3.5 Sonnet, ChatGPT / OpenAI, GitHub Copilot, Google Gemini, Antigravity, Cursor, Lovable (leveraged to deliver bug-free code 3x faster while maintaining rigorous security/quality standards)
- **Development & Design Tools**: VS Code, Git/GitHub, Notepad++, Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Canva
- **Operating Systems**: Linux (Ubuntu server administration), Windows

## Detailed Professional Experience

### Senior WordPress Support Engineer | Presstigers (Carlsbad, CA 92011, USA)
*March 2021 – Present*
- Leading full-stack engineering and senior tier support for the renowned *Simple Job Board* plugin and its commercial enterprise add-ons.
- Managing complex client queries, diagnosing deeply nested technical bugs, and communicating directly with enterprise customers on custom architecture, feature requirements, and delivery roadmaps.

### Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack WordPress Developer) | Nextbridge (Johar Town, Lahore)
*March 2021 – Present*
- Spearheading end-to-end full stack WordPress development across multiple high-stakes client portfolios.
- Developing and customizing advanced WordPress themes and plugins, integrating third-party enterprise APIs, and optimizing site performance within strict deadlines.
- Converting complex Figma and PSD designs into responsive, cross-browser compatible WordPress builds.
- Mentoring team members, troubleshooting critical live server performance anomalies, and driving project management excellence.

### Web Developer | Assistree Consults (Sabzazar, Lahore)
*September 2020 – February 2021*
- Designed, developed, and maintained diverse small to medium-scale commercial web properties.
- Performed extensive theme/plugin customizations and built responsive layouts using Elementor, WPBakery, and DIVI.

### Freelance Full Stack WordPress Developer | Global Client Portfolio
*September 2018 – Present*
- Successfully delivered 80+ custom web development and WordPress projects for digital agencies and international businesses worldwide.
- Handled entire project lifecycles: client discovery, technical scoping, requirement analysis, database design, full stack implementation, QA testing, and post-launch maintenance.

## Why Hire Nabeel Ahmad for Your Next WordPress or Web Project?
Nabeel Ahmad combines deep engineering discipline (BS CS from UET Lahore + 7 years of production code) with exceptional client communication and senior support experience. Whether you need a complex custom WordPress plugin, a high-converting e-commerce store, or an enterprise-grade API integration, Nabeel ensures clean code, bulletproof security, 100% responsiveness, and rapid delivery.
